scope: Ram 1500, Jeep Wrangler, Jeep Grand Cherokee, Kia Sportage, Kia Telluride, Kia Seltos, Kia Forte, Dodge Durango, Chrysler Pacifica/Voyager, BMW X5
validation_notes: Restored from local batch survivors and Phase 3 production records.
Family-level reconstruction was used where the original Phase 2 record did not survive locally.
Do not treat split variants as new batch scope; they are source material for the original family record.

vehicles.trim: Universal schedule; gasoline, eTorque, EcoDiesel, and driveline applicability varies
vehicles.source: 2021 Ram 1500 Owner's Manual / Mopar vehicle information

interval.logic: oil-change indicator; do not exceed 10,000 miles, 12 months, or applicable engine-hour limit

maintenance.notes: Diesel limits differ and require the EcoDiesel supplement.

interval.logic: with each oil-change interval or sooner for uneven wear

maintenance.notes: Inspection frequency follows use and oil-monitor timing.
Dusty operation can shorten interval.

interval.logic: fixed interval under normal gasoline use

maintenance.notes: Inspect/replace more often under dust.
Does not apply to diesel.
Coolant type and diesel circuit applicability require validation.

maintenance.service: Transfer case and axle fluid inspection/replacement
maintenance.notes: Normal schedule is primarily inspection/condition based; axle type matters.

interval.logic: no universal fixed normal-use interval in owner schedule

maintenance.notes: Do not add a dealer-recommended flush interval without an official engine/transmission schedule.

validation_flags: Official PDF was portal-restricted in this extraction environment.
Confirm cabin-filter and spark-plug intervals against the exact 2021 DT manual.

vehicles.trim: Universal schedule; engine and driveline applicability varies
vehicles.engine: 2.0L turbo, 3.6L V6, or diesel depending on configuration

maintenance.notes: Diesel schedule differs.

interval.logic: with oil-change interval or sooner for off-road/uneven wear

maintenance.notes: Off-road use requires more frequent inspection.
Dust can shorten interval.
Inspect after dusty or off-road operation.
Engine-specific verification required.
Use specified OAT coolant.
Transmission type and duty cycle matter.

maintenance.service: Transfer case and axle fluid service
maintenance.notes: Inspect after water crossings and intensive off-road use.

validation_flags: Portal restriction prevented direct official PDF extraction; aggregator copy may be used only as a flagged fallback.
Split gasoline, diesel, manual, and automatic records.
Off-road and water-crossing service cannot be represented by mileage alone.

vehicles.trim: WK2 schedule; engine and driveline applicability varies
vehicles.source: 2021 Jeep Grand Cherokee Owner's Manual / Mopar vehicle information

maintenance.notes: Engine hours and severe duty can shorten interval.
Inspect sooner for uneven wear.
Dust can shorten interval.
Inspect earlier under dust.
6.4L performance engine may have a shorter interval.
Use specified OAT coolant.
Driveline system and duty cycle matter.

interval.logic: no universal fixed normal-use owner-manual interval

maintenance.notes: Avoid adding dealer flush intervals without official support.

validation_flags: Confirm performance-engine spark-plug interval and transmission schedule.

interval.logic: whichever comes first under normal use

maintenance.notes: Severe use generally reduces interval to about 3,750 miles or 6 months.
Inspect tire condition and pressure.
Dust and pollution can shorten interval.
Earlier under dusty use.
The 2.0L turbo may require replacement near 45,000 miles; split before production.
No fixed normal-use replacement is generally listed.

interval.logic: initial replacement; every 30,000 miles or 24 months afterward

maintenance.notes: Verify exact first interval in US manual.
Replace based on condition/schedule.

validation_flags: Split 2.4L and 2.0L turbo records because spark-plug intervals differ.

interval.logic: whichever comes first under normal use

maintenance.notes: Severe use generally reduces interval to about 3,750 miles or 6 months.
Inspect wear and pressure.
Earlier under dust/pollution.
Earlier under dusty use.
Use specified iridium plugs.
No fixed normal-use replacement is generally listed.

maintenance.service: Rear differential and transfer-case fluid service
maintenance.notes: AWD only and duty-cycle dependent.

interval.logic: initial replacement; every 30,000 miles or 24 months afterward

maintenance.notes: Verify exact first interval in US manual.
Replace based on condition/schedule.

validation_flags: Transmission and AWD fluid replacements are severe-use conditional.

maintenance.notes: Do not exceed manufacturer maximum interval. Confirm exact miles/months from official manual.
